1001100100111101 1000101010100001 0 -> sum: 0010001111011110, cout: 1

1011011110110000 1110101011111110 1 -> sum: 1010001010101111, cout: 1
1000001111100101 1011101100101010 0 -> sum: 0011111100001111, cout: 1
0100110001110111 0011101000110001 0 -> sum: 1000011010101000, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
